/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/AttributeOrder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/Catalyst.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/IndexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/InputHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/VertexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/VertexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/catalyst.dir/src/Window.cpp.o -o catalyst  lib/glfw/glfw-3.3.7/src/libglfw3.a lib/libGLEWd.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so
